pool.baseline: sometimes i just stare at the ceiling for hours thinking about how everything is literally just a cosmic accident. like, the sun is gonna explode, the universe is gonna go dark, and every single thing i've ever felt or done will be erased like it never happened. it makes everything feel so pointless. why even bother struggling through the day if the end result is just nothingness?

pool.baseline: The candle flickers low, much like the guttering flame of my own soul. How can one continue to breathe when the very air feels heavy with the ashes of broken promises? He has gone, and with him, the light has vanished from this wretched world. It feels as though the shadows are calling to me, whispering that there is no path forward, only the silent, dark peace of the void. I find myself longing to simply... cease. To let the night swallow me whole so this ache might finally be stilled.
